ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status (0 - not survived, 1 - survived) */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger's class (1 - 1st class, 2 - 2nd class, 3 - 3rd class) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Passenger's name */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Passenger's sex */,
  "age" REAL /* Passenger's age */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "ticket" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid */,
  "embarked" TEXT /* Port of embarkation */,
  "age_cat" TEXT /* Age category (adult or child) */,
  "cabin_cat" TEXT /* Cabin category */,
  "relatives" INTEGER /* Count of relatives (siblings, spouses, parents, children) on board */,
  "is_alone" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the passenger has any relatives on board */,
  "home_city" TEXT /* Passengers' home city */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination of the passenger */,
  "travel_group_size" INTEGER /* Number of people traveling with the passenger */,
  "title" TEXT /* Passengers' title (Mr., Mrs., Miss, etc.) */,
  "age_at_embarkation" REAL /* Age of the passenger at the time of embarking */,
  "is_minor" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the passenger is a minor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_pclass FOREIGN KEY ("pclass") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_cabin_cat FOREIGN KEY ("cabin_cat") REFERENCES cabin_categories ("cabin_cat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_age_cat FOREIGN KEY ("age_cat") REFERENCES age_categories ("age_cat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_ticket FOREIGN KEY ("ticket") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passengers_embarked FOREIGN KEY ("embarked") REFERENCES ports ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class (1st, 2nd, 3rd) */,
  "class_description" TEXT /* Description of each class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_name" TEXT /* Name of the port (S, C, Q) */,
  "port_code" TEXT /* Standardized port code for each port */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographic location of each port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabins" (
  "cabin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin */,
  "cabin_name" TEXT /* Name of the cabin (C123, C85, etc.) */,
  "cabin_category" TEXT /* Category of the cabin (C, None, etc.) */,
  "deck_number" INTEGER /* Deck number where the cabin is located */,
  "cabin_type" TEXT /* Type of cabin (e.g., single, double, suite) */,
  "cabin_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the cabin */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "ticket_number" TEXT /* Ticket number */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket (e.g., one-way, return) */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date when the ticket was purchased */,
  "purchase_location" TEXT /* Location where the ticket was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_categories" (
  "age_cat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age category */,
  "age_cat_name" TEXT /* Name of the age category (adult, child) */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range for each category (e.g., 0-11, 12-18) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_cat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cabin_categories" (
  "cabin_cat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cabin category */,
  "cabin_cat_name" TEXT /* Name of the cabin category (C, None, etc.) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of each cabin category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cabin_cat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (admin, researcher, etc.) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of each user role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "login_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the user has logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (view, edit, delete) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the data (e.g., web, API) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* ID of the passenger whose data was changed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (insert, update, delete) */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change (e.g., typo correction, data update) */,
  "change_approver" TEXT /* User who approved the change (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_rates" (
  "survival_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival rate calculation */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group (e.g., 'women', 'children', etc.) */,
  "survival_rate" REAL /* Survival rate for the group */,
  "survival_rate_source" TEXT /* Source of the survival rate data */,
  "survival_rate_date" TEXT /* Date when the survival rate was calculated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survival_rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the query */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the query */,
  "query_category" TEXT /* Category of the query (e.g., demographic, survival rate) */,
  "query_tags" TEXT /* Tags or keywords associated with the query */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "visualization_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data used in the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization (e.g., bar chart, scatter plot) */,
  "visualization_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id")
)
